goal: Expose state graph test execution kind, status, command preview, result preview, and relation metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human test report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph test reports include test events, test kinds, statuses, command previews, result previews, and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert test execution lineage.
